note: [2026-07-16 S1/BURST REBUILD (owner-directed) — the materialize freeze had inherited a blablalink-prose mis-parse: 'allies who previously USED their Burst Skills' (old text 'cast') missed the burstCasters regex so the 64.51% went to ALL allies, and 'of the skill user's ATK' (old 'caster's') missed the casterAtk regex so it was a plain atkPct (% of each target's OWN ATK — a huge over-buff); Reload Speed/DEF/shield lines were dropped. NOW kit-exact: S1 at Full Burst start -> THIS chain's burst casters get casterAtkPct 64.51 + reloadSpeedPct 44.35 (15s); non-casters get defPct 37.44 (value is % of HER DEF in-kit; DEF is damage-inert in the sim so the distinction is immaterial, recorded for completeness) + reloadSpeedPct 44.35 (15s) — disjoint groups, engine burstCasters/nonBurstCasters reset at FB end so membership is per-chain. Burst: team attackDamagePct 36.24 (15s) + shield event 10.45% of her Max HP (15s; no HP pool modeled — fires 'shielded' triggers for shield-synergy kits). Offline parser upgraded for all four wordings. --- S2 Relax cycle: 43 normal attacks per stack x 20 stacks -> heal proc -> team Attack Damage 20.99% for 7s. HEAL-TRIGGERED (corrected 2026-07-14, owner): the +20.99% AD fires on 'when recovery takes effect' — i.e. whenever Crown RECEIVES a heal — NOT on a fixed self-cadence. Modeled as two blocks: (A) her own Relax self-heal every 860 hits (emits a heal event to self), and (B) a 'recovery' trigger that grants the team +20.99% AD 7s. In a healer-less team B fires ~once/26s (~27% uptime) off her own Relax; when a frequent healer is present (e.g. Helm's 0.59% full-charge heal every ~1.5s) B is refreshed to near-permanent — the previously-missing shared team buff that read the DPS supports ~15% cold in the bare control frame. Taunt/invuln portions dropped (defensive; the HEAL is NOT dropped — it is the trigger). NAMU CROSS-CHECK (2026-07-13): her S1 'One For All' actually targets DISJOINT groups - burst casters get caster-ATK 64.51% + reload 44.35%, NON-casters get caster-DEF 37.44% + reload 44.35% - so no single unit ever legitimately receives both 44.35% reload lines; the same-caster-same-slot overwrite rule fixes the parser's both-lines-to-everyone artifact and matches the real kit structure. [materialized 2026-07-16: skill1/burst auto-filled from the offline parser (blablalink prose) — behavior-identical to the prior runtime parse; NOT hand-verified]
